name: fleet-refresh-0-19-3
title: Roll out sd-ai-command-pack 0.19.11 to the fleet
description: Refresh every stale registered consumer to the corrected pack release 0.19.11 after integration review stopped earlier rollout candidates.
creator: sdelmas
notes: The rollout began at 0.19.3 and stopped for several pack-owned integration findings before converging on 0.19.11. Release 0.19.11 was tagged from the reviewed source merge, all seven registered consumers were refreshed sequentially through green CI and exact-head review, post-merge audits passed, and final fleet preflight reports every consumer at target.
